name: cloudfunc
description: Lightweight serverless function execution platform using Node.js, Docker, RabbitMQ, and PostgreSQL.

scripts.start: concurrently "node gateway/gateway.js" "node registry/index.js" "node \"worker service/container-manager/manager.js\"" "node \"worker service/function-runner/runner.js\"" "node \"worker service/Worker/index.js\""
